en: How the gold has grown dim, how the pure gold is changed! The holy stones lie scattered at the head of every street.
zh: 黃金怎麼竟然失去光澤，純金怎麼竟然變色？ 聖殿的石頭都被拋棄在各街頭上。

en: The precious sons of Zion, worth their weight in fine gold, how they are regarded as earthen pots, the work of a potter's hands!
zh: 錫安尊貴的眾民，本來和精金一樣貴重； 現在怎麼竟被看為瓦器，好像陶匠手中所作的呢？

en: Even jackals offer the breast; they nurse their young, but the daughter of my people has become cruel, like the ostriches in the wilderness.
zh: 野狗尚且用乳房哺養牠們的幼兒； 但我的眾民變得多麼殘忍，像曠野的鴕鳥一樣。

en: The tongue of the nursing infant sticks to the roof of its mouth for thirst; the children beg for food, but no one gives to them.
zh: 嬰兒的舌頭因乾渴而緊貼上膛； 孩童求餅，卻沒有人分給他們。

en: Those who once feasted on delicacies perish in the streets; those who were brought up in purple embrace ash heaps.
zh: 那些從前吃美食的，現今都在街上孤單淒涼； 那些從前在豪奢生活中長大的，現今卻在垃圾堆中打滾。

en: For the chastisement of the daughter of my people has been greater than the punishment of Sodom, which was overthrown in a moment, and no hands were wrung for her.
zh: 我眾民 的罪孽比所多瑪的罪惡更大； 所多瑪在轉眼之間傾覆了，儘管無人攻擊它。

en: Her princes were purer than snow, whiter than milk; their bodies were more ruddy than coral, the beauty of their form was like sapphire.
zh: 錫安的貴族素來比雪更明亮，比奶更潔白； 他們的身體比紅寶石更紅潤，他們的樣貌像藍寶石一樣美麗。

en: Now their face is blacker than soot; they are not recognized in the streets; their skin has shriveled on their bones; it has become as dry as wood.
zh: 現在他們的面貌比煤炭還黑，在街上再沒有人認得他們； 他們皮包骨頭，枯瘦如柴。

en: Happier were the victims of the sword than the victims of hunger, who wasted away, pierced by lack of the fruits of the field.
zh: 那些死於刀下的比餓死的還好； 餓死的因缺乏田間的出產，就日漸消瘦而死亡。

en: The hands of compassionate women have boiled their own children; they became their food during the destruction of the daughter of my people.
zh: 慈心的婦人親手烹煮自己所生的孩子； 在我眾民 遭毀滅的時候，孩子竟成了母親的食物。

en: The LORD gave full vent to his wrath; he poured out his hot anger, and he kindled a fire in Zion that consumed its foundations.
zh: 耶和華大發震怒，傾倒他的烈怒； 他在錫安放火，吞滅了錫安的根基。

en: The kings of the earth did not believe, nor any of the inhabitants of the world, that foe or enemy could enter the gates of Jerusalem.
zh: 地上的君王，以及世上所有的居民都不相信， 會有任何敵人和仇敵攻進耶路撒冷的城門。

en: This was for the sins of her prophets and the iniquities of her priests, who shed in the midst of her the blood of the righteous.
zh: 因為錫安先知的罪惡，和祭司的罪孽， 就是他們在城中流了義人的血，

en: They wandered, blind, through the streets; they were so defiled with blood that no one was able to touch their garments.
zh: 所以，他們像瞎子在街上流蕩，他們被血玷污， 沒有人可以觸摸他們的衣服。

en: "Away! Unclean!" people cried at them. "Away! Away! Do not touch!" So they became fugitives and wanderers; people said among the nations, "They shall stay with us no longer."
zh: 有人向他們喊叫：“走開！你們不潔的人；走開！走開！不要觸摸我。” 他們到處逃亡飄流的時候，列國的人就說：“他們再不能在這裡寄居。”

en: The LORD himself has scattered them; he will regard them no more; no honor was shown to the priests, no favor to the elders.
zh: 耶和華親臨 分散他們，不再看顧他們； 人不再尊重祭司，也不厚待長老。

en: Our eyes failed, ever watching vainly for help; in our watching we watched for a nation which could not save.
zh: 我們徒然等待幫助，等到雙目失去視力； 我們在瞭望臺上期望一個不能拯救我們的國家來臨。

en: They dogged our steps so that we could not walk in our streets; our end drew near; our days were numbered, for our end had come.
zh: 敵人追蹤我們，使我們不敢在自己的街道上行走。 我們的結局近了，我們的日子滿了； 我們的結局已經到了。

en: Our pursuers were swifter than the eagles in the heavens; they chased us on the mountains; they lay in wait for us in the wilderness.
zh: 追趕我們的比空中的鷹還快； 他們在山上追趕我們，在曠野埋伏攻擊我們。

en: The breath of our nostrils, the LORD's anointed, was captured in their pits, of whom we said, "Under his shadow we shall live among the nations."
zh: 耶和華所膏立的，我們鼻孔的氣息，在他們的陷坑中被捉住； 我們論到他曾說：“我們要在他的蔭庇之下，在列國中存活。”

en: Rejoice and be glad, O daughter of Edom, you who dwell in the land of Uz; but to you also the cup shall pass; you shall become drunk and strip yourself bare.
zh: 以東人哪，烏斯地的居民哪，歡喜快樂吧！ 這杯也要傳到你那裡，你必喝醉以致赤身露體。

en: The punishment of your iniquity, O daughter of Zion, is accomplished; he will keep you in exile no longer; but your iniquity, O daughter of Edom, he will punish; he will uncover your sins.
zh: 錫安的居民 哪！你的刑罰已經受夠了，耶和華必不再使你流亡； 以東的居民哪！他必懲罰你的罪孽，揭露你的罪惡。
